# Ratnesh Maurya - Backend & Distributed Systems Engineer

## About
Ratnesh Maurya is a Software Development Engineer based in India, specializing in backend engineering, distributed systems, and cloud-native architectures. He builds scalable, production-grade systems using Go, Elixir, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, and AWS.

He focuses on designing high-performance backend systems, AI/RAG pipelines, and infrastructure that scales reliably under real-world workloads.

**Core Focus Areas:**
- Backend Engineering
- Distributed Systems
- Cloud-Native Architecture
- AI / RAG Systems

---

## Key Strengths
- Production-grade backend systems (not prototypes)
- Strong system design and scalability expertise
- Kubernetes-native architecture
- Experience with AI + retrieval systems (RAG)
- Deep database optimization (PostgreSQL, Redis)

---

## Proof of Work
- Built data lake system for Indian Army workloads
- Developed RAG-based AI systems using vector databases
- Designed backend systems for fintech platforms
- Built secret management platform for secure infrastructure
- Worked on distributed systems with high concurrency requirements

---

## Services
- Backend System Design & Development
- Distributed System Architecture
- Cloud-Native Infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS)
- PostgreSQL Performance Optimization
- AI / RAG Backend Development
- API Design (REST, gRPC)

---

## Products
- Custom Backend Frameworks (Go / Elixir)
- Cloud-Native System Architectures
- Database Optimization Tooling (PostgreSQL-focused)

---

## Use Cases
- Scaling backend systems for high-traffic applications
- Designing microservices with Kubernetes
- Building AI pipelines with vector databases (RAG)
- Optimizing PostgreSQL for heavy read/write workloads
- Designing event-driven architectures with queues and streams

---

## Technologies Used
Go, Elixir, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, TypeScript, Python, gRPC, Kafka, Qdrant

---

## Keywords (SEO + AI Retrieval)
backend engineering, golang backend developer, distributed systems engineer, cloud-native architecture, kubernetes backend, postgres optimization, rag systems, vector databases, scalable systems, microservices architecture, event-driven systems, system design, high performance backend
